name: Suspicious DLL Execution via Register-CimProvider
description: Detection of Register-CimProvider.exe being used to load or execute a DLL, which is a known LOLBIN abuse for defense evasion, persistence, or code execution through WMI providers.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when Register-CimProvider.exe was executed.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the Register-CimProvider.exe executable.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of Register-CimProvider.exe.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account that executed Register-CimProvider.exe.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process of Register-CimProvider.exe.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Sysmon event ID (expected to be 1).

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
